approvals_inbox.notes: Requested role was HR_ADMIN but account sarankarthick.maran@nulogic.io resolves to Saran V with role EMPLOYEE in the system. Approvals inbox still accessible (all users can view their own inbox). Zero pending approvals as EMPLOYEE has no delegated approval authority.

consistency_observations: All three roles see identical layout: Delegate/Pending/Approved Today/Rejected Today counters + filter chips (All/Leave/Expense/Asset/Travel/Recruitment/Others) + empty state.
All three roles report 0/0/0/0 across all counters, indicating the workflow/approval seed data contains no pending approval_task rows for any assignee in the test tenant.
MY SPACE sidebar item 'Approvals' is visible under PEOPLE nav for all roles (every user is an employee; route is non-gated).
No 403/500 responses encountered; page renders successfully under all three sessions.

bugs.title: Approvals inbox empty for all tested roles — likely missing seed data
bugs.description: Under TEAM_LEAD (mani), MANAGER (sumit), and EMPLOYEE (saran), /approvals/inbox reports 0 pending approvals. Without seeded approval_task rows we cannot exercise the pending-list rendering, filter chips, or status transitions. Recommend seeding at least one pending approval_task per approver role in dev/QA tenant.
bugs.evidence: getPageText shows identical empty state across all three sessions; counter badges all read 0.
repro_steps: Observe Pending=0 and 'You're all caught up' empty state
Repeat for sumit@nulogic.io and sarankarthick.maran@nulogic.io — same result

bugs.title: Account sarankarthick.maran@nulogic.io was listed as HR_ADMIN but is seeded as EMPLOYEE (Saran V)
bugs.description: Worker brief requested role=HR_ADMIN for sarankarthick.maran@nulogic.io. The system returns displayed role EMPLOYEE (Saran V). Either the test roster is out of date or the user has not been granted HR_ADMIN role in the seed. No HR_ADMIN demo account is visible in the login demo list either (demo list only shows SUPER ADMIN, MANAGER, TEAM LEAD, EMPLOYEE, HR MANAGER, RECRUITMENT ADMIN, plus HR Lead team leads).
bugs.recommendation: Either seed a distinct HR_ADMIN test account (e.g. hradmin@nulogic.io) or update the worker brief to target JN Jagadeesh (HR MANAGER) for HR-role approvals coverage.

network.api_requests_observed: No /api/v1/approvals or /api/v1/approval-tasks requests captured because chrome MCP network tracking was initialized after page load. Page-level absence of pending rows suggests the backing list endpoint returned an empty array rather than erroring.

console.notes: No error-pattern console messages captured. Chrome MCP console tracking was initialized after page render; no retroactive capture available.
